reasoning: The control AC-4(29) focuses on ensuring secure information flow by enforcing filtering and secure transport mechanisms. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that network communications are encrypted and secure. NetworkPolicies can enforce TLS for secure communication, Ingress resources should have TLS enabled to ensure secure transport, and service meshes like Istio can enforce mutual TLS (mTLS) for secure service-to-service communication. Additionally, admission controllers can be configured to enforce SSL/TLS policies.
title: Information Flow Enforcement - Information flow enforcement | filter orchestration engines when transferring in
